case_number: civil dispute and F.C. Suit No.300 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-683 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025 Mr. G.M. Leghari advocate holds brief for Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, Assistant A.G. Sindh. Mr. Iltaf Hussain Khokhar advocate files Vakalatnama and objections on behalf of respondent No.4, taken on record. Apparently, the matter pertains to civil dispute and F.C. Suit No.300 of 2025 [Re-Muhammad Noman Malik v. Shahid Hussain and others] before the learned Senior Civil Judge-II, Nawabshah, as such, civil dispute is to be adjudicated by a civil competent Court in accordance with law. So far the alleged harassment to the petitioner is concerned; police officials are directed to perform their paramount functions in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner and provide him protection in accordance with law. However, any dispute of civil nature, the parties are at liberty to agitate the same before a civil competent Court. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
